message:
feat(focus,modal): expand deferred focus and modal coordinator test coverage

Extends the focus manager and modal integration with additional edge
case handling for host-blur scenarios:
- focus/manager.rs: additional guard paths for focus state transitions
- modal/focus_integration.rs: new tests for blurred modal pop + focus
  change interaction patterns

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
